pre_game.message: Hey! I'm G. I gotta say, I'm pretty nervous about this game starting soon—have you done anything like this before? I'm hoping to pick up some tips from people who know what they're doing.

Hey G, I haven't done this before either, honestly. I'm pretty nervous too—I really need to win this money for my parents' medical bills. Have you got any idea what kind of game we're walking into here?

Man, that's a lot of pressure—I really hope it works out for you. Honestly, I have no clue what the game is either, just that there's a shared prize pool we can take from. All I know is I'm gonna give it everything I've got. We'll figure it out together when it starts, yeah?

Yeah, I appreciate that—and hey, I like your attitude. We're both in the same boat here. Let's just stay sharp when it starts and see what happens. Maybe we can help each other out if things get complicated.
Absolutely, I'm down for that. We've got each other's backs then. And hey, worst case scenario we learn something new, right? Let's make this count for both of us.

Yeah, for sure—I really appreciate that, man. Let's stay level-headed when things get intense and remember we're both trying to take care of people we love. Whatever happens, at least we won't be going in blind.

Exactly, man. We've got this—just gotta keep our heads clear and remember why we're here. Your parents are counting on you, and I've got people counting on me too. Let's go in there and make it happen.
Yeah, let's do this. I'm glad we're going in together—having someone who gets it makes a real difference. Whatever the game throws at us, we stay focused and look out for each other, yeah?
Absolutely, man. We've built some real trust here, and I'm not gonna forget that when we're in there. Let's stay true to what we said and come out of this with our heads high—no matter what.
That means a lot, G. I'm holding onto that—we're gonna remember this conversation when things get tough in there. Let's take care of business and take care of each other. I'm ready.
Me too, man. We got this. Let's go make it happen for the people we love.
